articles.author: Eric Branch
articles.title: Olympian Alysa Liu gets hero’s welcome at SFO after bringing home skating gold - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: Alysa Liu, the first American woman to earn Olympic skating gold since 2002 with her victory in Milan, was greeted by fans waiting for her at the airport.
articles.content:
American figure skater Alysa Liu of Richmond celebrates her score after competing in the womens figure skating free program at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan, Italy, on Thursday.
